steps.title: Select Voltage Ratings
steps.description: V_BR must exceed peak reverse voltage with margin.

steps.title: Check Current Rating
steps.description: I_F must exceed maximum forward current with derating.

steps.title: Consider Switching Speed
steps.description: Use Schottky for high-frequency; standard for line frequency.

steps.title: Verify Package
steps.description: Through-hole or SMD based on assembly method.

tips: Always derate voltage by 50% for reliability
Use Schottky for fast switching applications
